name: ExtensionSubscriptionTopic_DerivedFrom
title: R5: Based on FHIR protocol or definition (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubscriptionTopic.derivedFrom` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubscriptionTopic.derivedFrom` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SubscriptionTopic)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubscriptionTopic.derivedFrom` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SubscriptionTopic)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubscriptionTopic.derivedFrom` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionTopic` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionTopic.derivedFrom` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Based on FHIR protocol or definition (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionTopic.derivedFrom` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionTopic` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionTopic.derivedFrom` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Based on FHIR protocol or definition
element.definition: The canonical URL pointing to another FHIR-defined SubscriptionTopic that is adhered to in whole or in part by this SubscriptionTopic.
